name: First State Bank
description_short: 1st State Bank is a community bank in Randolph, Nebraska offering traditional banking services including checking, savings, online banking, and agricultural lending.
description_long:
1st State Bank operates as a traditional community bank based in Randolph, Nebraska, serving the local area through a single branch location at 102 E Broadway. The bank has established itself as a local financial institution with a focus on relationship banking and community service. Founded to serve personal and business customers in rural Nebraska, the bank maintains a physical presence and telephone support at 402-337-0323.

1st State Bank offers a comprehensive range of traditional banking services. These include personal and business checking and savings accounts, online banking with bill pay and eAlerts functionality, mobile banking with mobile check deposit capabilities, safe deposit boxes, wire transfers, notary services, cashier's checks, money orders, direct deposit setup, escrow services, and night depository access. The bank notably advertises long-term farm land loans with competitive interest rates, indicating specialization in agricultural lending to support the rural Nebraska economy.

1st State Bank distinguishes itself through its emphasis on agricultural lending products and its integration of basic digital banking tools like mobile check deposit and online account management. The bank promotes a free mobile app and provides financial education resources and tools to customers. As a community bank, it maintains direct local relationships and personalized service rather than operating as a large national institution.

1st State Bank is best suited for customers in the Randolph, Nebraska area seeking traditional banking services with local relationship banking and those with agricultural lending needs. The bank's limited geographic footprint and single branch location means it is not practical for customers outside the immediate area. The website provides limited information about specific product features, rates, or account minimums, which may require direct contact with the bank for detailed comparisons.
services: Mobile banking app with mobile check deposit
pros: Offers long-term farm land loans with advertised competitive interest rates, addressing rural agricultural lending needs
Provides mobile check deposit functionality through free mobile app for convenient banking
Includes comprehensive traditional banking services including safe deposit boxes, escrow, wire transfers, and notary services
Offers night depository access for business customers who need after-hours deposit options
Provides online banking with bill pay and eAlerts for account management and notifications
Local community bank with direct in-person service and relationship banking approach
Offers direct deposit setup and personal money orders for customer convenience
cons: Single branch location in Randolph, Nebraska limits accessibility for customers outside the immediate area
Website provides minimal information about account types, interest rates, fees, or minimum balance requirements
No information provided about customer service hours, account opening process, or product-specific details
Limited digital banking features compared to larger regional or national banks
No mention of deposit insurance or FDIC membership details on the website
best_for: Agricultural businesses and farmers seeking specialized long-term farm land loans in rural Nebraska
Randolph, Nebraska and surrounding area residents needing local relationship banking and personalized service
Small business owners in the region requiring business banking and escrow services
Customers preferring community banks over large national institutions
diagnosis: 1st State Bank is best for agricultural customers and Randolph, Nebraska-area residents seeking traditional community banking with personalized service and specialized farm lending. The main caveat is the bank's single-branch, limited-geography model—customers outside the immediate Randolph area will find it impractical, and the website lacks transparency on rates, fees, and specific product terms, requiring direct contact for comparison.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
